title: uia_find_all
description: Discover all interactive UI elements in the attached window. Returns a paginated, filterable flat list.

roles.description: Restrict results to these AT-SPI/UIA roles, e.g. ["push button", "check box"]. Empty list returns all.

has_actions.description: When true (default), only return elements with at least one invokable action.

named_only.description: When true (default), skip elements without a name.

target.description: Optional selector for a subtree root. Omit or pass {} to search the whole window.

name_contains.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on element names. Empty string disables the filter.

limit.description: Maximum number of elements to return per page.

offset.description: Number of matching elements to skip. Use with limit to paginate.
